description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, rectangular footprint and a low-pitched, gable roof covered in light gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, accented by wooden shutters on the windows and a matching garage door. The front facade features a paved driveway flanked by manicured grass lawns and several palm trees, with a small garden area near the entrance. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with larger panes on the front and side elevations. The roof extends over the garage, creating a subtle L-shaped layout. The overall design is clean and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on horizontal lines.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a light gable roof, neutral walls, wooden shutters, and a landscaped front yard with palm trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, paved driveway, and palm trees lining the front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated roofline, garage side, and a stretch of green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with multiple windows and a large expanse of grass.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the driveway, garden area, and the intersection of the main building and garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
